name: Beef Ribs
recipeIngredient: 8 lb Ribs from standing rib roast
recipeInstructions:
1. If desired, marinate ribs prior to cooking.
2. Arrange ribs on rack in baking pan.
3. Brush barbecue sauce generously over ribs, covering them thoroughly.
4. Bake at 375°F to 400°F for 45 minutes, basting frequently with sauce.
5. Continue baking until ribs are tender and well done.
